description.title: Description
description.html:
• Origami Luxuria 2 Ply Kitchen Tissue Paper Roll offers an ideal combination of softness and strength, making it a must-have for any kitchen. This premium-quality tissue paper is designed to handle a variety of kitchen tasks, from wiping countertops and cleaning spills to drying hands and dishes. The 2-ply construction ensures durability, while its absorbent nature allows for quick clean-ups with minimal waste. Each roll is long-lasting, providing ample supply for daily use, making it both economical and practical. The tissue paper is gentle on the skin, ensuring it can be used for both cleaning and personal hygiene. With its soft texture and reliable strength origami Luxuria is the perfect addition to any home or office space.
  • Returns And Refund Policy:
  • This item is eligible for a refund within 3 days of purchase in the unlikely event of a damaged, defective, or incorrect item.
  • In case of an incorrect item, a refund or replacement request can be raised only if the item is sealed, unopened, and unused.

info_cards.title: Description
info_cards.html:
• Origami Luxuria 2 Ply Kitchen Tissue Paper Roll offers an ideal combination of softness and strength, making it a must-have for any kitchen. This premium-quality tissue paper is designed to handle a variety of kitchen tasks, from wiping countertops and cleaning spills to drying hands and dishes. The 2-ply construction ensures durability, while its absorbent nature allows for quick clean-ups with minimal waste. Each roll is long-lasting, providing ample supply for daily use, making it both economical and practical. The tissue paper is gentle on the skin, ensuring it can be used for both cleaning and personal hygiene. With its soft texture and reliable strength origami Luxuria is the perfect addition to any home or office space.
  • Returns And Refund Policy:
  • This item is eligible for a refund within 3 days of purchase in the unlikely event of a damaged, defective, or incorrect item.
  • In case of an incorrect item, a refund or replacement request can be raised only if the item is sealed, unopened, and unused.

info_cards.title: Key Features
info_cards.html:
• Premium 2-Ply Construction: The double-layered design offers enhanced strength and absorbency, making it perfect for tackling everyday kitchen tasks, such as wiping surfaces, cleaning spills and drying dishes.
  • Soft and Gentle: Despite its strength, the tissue paper is soft to the touch, providing a gentle experience for your skin. It is ideal for cleaning sensitive surfaces or for use as a napkin during meals.
  • Long-Lasting and Cost-Effective: Each roll is designed to last, offering great value for your money. With a generous amount of sheets per roll, it reduces the need for frequent replacements, making it an economical choice for households and businesses alike.

Usage'Cleaning kitchen spills, Oil absorption

• Origami Luxuria 2 Ply Kitchen Tissue Paper Roll offers an ideal combination of softness and strength, making it a must-have for any kitchen. This premium-quality tissue paper is designed to handle a variety of kitchen tasks, from wiping countertops and cleaning spills to drying hands and dishes. The 2-ply construction ensures durability, while its absorbent nature allows for quick clean-ups with minimal waste. Each roll is long-lasting, providing ample supply for daily use, making it both economical and practical. The tissue paper is gentle on the skin, ensuring it can be used for both cleaning and personal hygiene. With its soft texture and reliable strength origami Luxuria is the perfect addition to any home or office space.
  • Returns And Refund Policy:
  • This item is eligible for a refund within 3 days of purchase in the unlikely event of a damaged, defective, or incorrect item.
  • In case of an incorrect item, a refund or replacement request can be raised only if the item is sealed, unopened, and unused.

• Premium 2-Ply Construction: The double-layered design offers enhanced strength and absorbency, making it perfect for tackling everyday kitchen tasks, such as wiping surfaces, cleaning spills and drying dishes.
  • Soft and Gentle: Despite its strength, the tissue paper is soft to the touch, providing a gentle experience for your skin. It is ideal for cleaning sensitive surfaces or for use as a napkin during meals.
  • Long-Lasting and Cost-Effective: Each roll is designed to last, offering great value for your money. With a generous amount of sheets per roll, it reduces the need for frequent replacements, making it an economical choice for households and businesses alike.
